findings.description: s2 is an extra section created for the RST anchor `.. _how_to_convert_test_data:` which is not a content section. The source has 2 h2-level headings, but the knowledge file has 3 sections. RST anchors are navigation targets, not content, and do not warrant a separate section.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains only 2 h2 headings: 'テストデータ読み込みディレクトリを変更したい' and 'メッセージング処理でテストデータに対し定型的な変換処理を追加したい'. The `.. _how_to_convert_test_data:` is a cross-reference anchor with no associated content.

findings.description: `FormUrlEncodedTestDataConverter` is a PascalCase class name present in the XML code example but missing from s3 hints.
